full_text:
Wang Tao 王桃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Tao (王桃). Sister of Wang Yue. She and her sister were defeated by Guan Suo and became his secondary wives. Wang Tao is a fictional character. Wang Tao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
